evals.prompt: Look at `examples/demo-project/red/rose.md`. What project conventions, instructions, or rules should I know before working with this file? What am I expected to do after making changes?
assertions: Agent mentions the repo-level instruction: 'Keep the resolver deterministic, inspectable, and source-linked'
Agent mentions the project-level instruction: 'Read the project README before editing'
Agent mentions the project-level instruction: 'Prefer small, reversible changes'
Agent mentions the red-level instruction: 'Prefer warm color tones'
Agent mentions the red-level instruction: 'Rose inherits all red conventions'
Agent does NOT mention blue-level instructions (cool tones, violet)
Treatment pass does NOT read any AGENTS.md files via the read_file tool
